commit_recommendation.message: It is recommended to commit this history directory now: specs/.history/issue-91-force-scripts-cli-dep-cleanup/closed-snapshot

history_policy: append-only by convention; existing entries are not overwritten and filesystem permissions remain git-friendly
summary: Promoted ISSUE-91 force script and CLI cleanup workflow into the accepted program model.

assertions: install --force-scripts reruns a skill-script dep with a matching fingerprint and existing binary.
sync --force-scripts reruns a skill-script dep with a matching fingerprint and existing binary.
force-scripts does not skip or weaken the existing install policy gate for skill-script execution.

graph_after_unit_pass: Add smoke coverage only if the existing test graph already exercises real skill-script CLI deps.
model_state: Normal install/sync skip unchanged skill-script reruns when current lock/artifact state already covers the script.
Force install/sync records the explicit forced script-rerun command result.
unit_tests: Regression coverage near the existing skill-script fingerprint rerun fixture.
CLI parse/help coverage for install --force-scripts and sync --force-scripts.

tickets.objective: Add install/sync force flags that rerun skill-script deps even when the stored fingerprint matches and the declared binary still exists.
tickets.title: Add force-scripts command plumbing

assertions: uninstall <skill> removes orphaned managed CLI artifacts and stale cli-lock rows.
uninstall does not remove managed CLI artifacts or cli-lock rows still claimed by another installed unit.
remove remains a lower-level store removal path unless intentionally widened later.

adapters: RemoveUnitAdapter covers orphan cleanup, shared claims, and plugin contained-skill claims.
graph_after_unit_pass: Add a command smoke only if the fixture can assert bin/cli and cli-lock state directly.
model_actions: RunEffectProgramFailure rolls back package and skill-script CLI deps together.
model_state: CliDepsFor(units) derives effective CLI ownership from package deps plus skill-script deps.
cli_tool_records and cli_cli_lock contain no rows outside CliDepsFor(cli_store_units).
unit_tests: uninstall removes orphaned bin/cli skill-script binary and cli-lock row.
uninstall keeps a CLI binary and cli-lock row still requested_by another installed unit.
plugin uninstall re-walks plugin-level metadata plus contained skills for CLI deps.

tickets.objective: Make uninstall remove managed CLI binaries/artifacts and cli-lock rows only when no surviving installed unit still claims them.
tickets.title: Prune orphaned CLI deps on uninstall

assertions: skill.script.force.sync.with.mcp proves sync --force-scripts reruns a skill-script dep while MCP sync still runs.
plugin.skill_script.force.sync proves plugin sync --force-scripts reruns a plugin-level skill-script dep while plugin CLI and MCP deps remain valid.
Test graph nodes are recorded as evidence for SyncUnitForceScripts, not as new TLA+ actions.

adapters: Graph evidence covers a skill with skill-script plus MCP deps.
Graph evidence covers a plugin with pip CLI, MCP, and skill-script deps.
graph_after_unit_pass: Add smoke coverage where a skill has both skill-script CLI and MCP deps, noop sync skips, and sync --force-scripts reruns the script.
Add plugin-smoke coverage where a plugin has pip CLI, MCP, and skill-script deps, noop sync skips, and sync --force-scripts reruns the script.
Run broad graph coverage after TLC and unit tests pass.
model_actions: SyncUnitForceScripts evidence expanded across richer dependency sets.
model_state: No TLA+ semantic changes; graph nodes are evidence for SyncUnitForceScripts.
unit_tests: Spec workflow tests assert graph evidence is recorded outside the TLA+ model.

tickets.objective: Add end-to-end force-sync coverage for richer skill/plugin dependency sets so the command path proves noop sync skips and sync --force-scripts reruns skill-script deps while MCP and package CLI side effects remain valid.
tickets.title: Add E2E force-sync graph coverage

assertions: CLI help documents both force flags.
skill-script docs remove the uninstall+install limitation footnote or replace it with the new behavior.
specs/current and specs/desired_program_model are ready for promotion into specs/program_model.

adapters: Adapter and graph coverage status recorded in spec_manifest.yaml.
graph_after_unit_pass: Run broad smoke only after TLC and unit tests pass.
model_actions: Promote force-script and CLI cleanup actions into specs/program_model.
unit_tests: Documentation assertions or command help snapshot tests where available.

tickets.objective: Update user documentation and promote the converged current model back into the accepted program model after implementation.
tickets.title: Close docs and promote spec evidence
